SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BORDEN AND AIDEN BORDNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEWIS SOTO HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
